items.title: Meta’s loss is Thinking Machines’ gain
items.summary: Meta has been poaching talent from Thinking Machines Lab. But it's a two-way street.

items.title: ComfyUI hits $500M valuation as creators seek more control over AI-generated media
items.summary: ComfyUI, whose tools give creators more control over AI image, video, and audio generation, just raised $30 million.

items.title: Google to invest up to $40B in Anthropic in cash and compute
items.summary: Google plans up to $40B investment in Anthropic as AI rivals race to secure massive compute capacity, following the limited release of its powerful, cybersecurity-focused Mythos model.

items.title: Marked-up Mac minis flood eBay amid shortages driven by AI
items.summary: Apple’s sold-out Mac mini is spawning marked-up eBay listings as demand surges for the compact desktop, now favored for running local AI models and tools.

items.title: In another wild turn for AI chips, Meta signs deal for millions of Amazon AI CPUs
items.summary: Meta has commandeered a big chunk of Amazon's homegrown CPUs (not GPUs) for AI agentic workloads, signaling that a new kind of chip race has begun.
